SEARCH

Package cpdt.common.enums

package cpdt.common.enums
Provides the enumerated types used throughout the Chemical Plant Digital Twin (CPDT) platform.

This package defines the shared domain constants that represent device categories, measurement types, process areas, operational states, and alert severities. These enumerations provide a type-safe representation of fixed system concepts and ensure consistency across the simulator, common library, and backend modules.

Since:
1.0
Author:
Lakshmi Sanjeev
  • Enum Classes
    Class
    Description
    AlarmState
    Represents the state transition of a process alarm after evaluating newly received telemetry.
    AlertSeverity
    Defines the severity level assigned to an alert generated by the Digital Twin.
    DeviceStatus
    Represents the current operational status of a device within the Chemical Plant Digital Twin Platform.
    DeviceType
    Enumerates every supported device type that can exist within the Chemical Plant Digital Twin Platform.
    MeasurementType
    Enumerates every physical quantity that can be measured by the simulated devices.
    ProcessArea
    Represents the distinct process areas within the simulated chemical plant.
